ranked_accounts.reason_code: enum: CRITICAL_SLA_CREDIT | NETWORK_ENGINEERING_ESCALATION | FIELD_REPAIR_ESCALATION | ACTIVE_OUTAGE | AUTH_FAILED | LOW_RISK

credit_review_accounts: list of enterprise account ids sorted ascending
owner_notifications: list of user/team ids sorted by escalation priority

risk_audit.service_escalation_accounts: list of account IDs sorted ascending
risk_audit.enterprise_credit_accounts: list of enterprise account IDs sorted ascending
risk_audit.critical_incidents_reviewed: integer count of candidate enterprise incidents with Critical severity
risk_audit.not_ranked_credit_percent: integer SLA credit percent for credit-review incident not ranked top three
risk_audit.service_escalation_teams: list of escalation team enum values sorted alphabetically for ranked service escalations

environment_credit_audit.failed_export_runs_for_credit_review_acc: integer across full environment, not only candidate incidents

board_candidate_audit.candidate_service_records_with_active_ou: list of candidate service ticket IDs sorted ascending matching an active outage by service area and type
board_candidate_audit.candidate_service_records_with_post_trou: list of candidate service ticket IDs sorted ascending whose post-troubleshooting metrics still fail any threshold
board_candidate_audit.candidate_enterprise_incidents_with_fail: list of candidate enterprise incident IDs sorted ascending that have at least one failed export run

board_full_environment_audit.critical_monthly_export_incident_ids: list of Critical monthly_export incident IDs sorted ascending across the full console
board_full_environment_audit.failed_runs_for_critical_monthly_export_: integer failed export-run count for Critical monthly_export incidents across the full console
board_full_environment_audit.enterprise_accounts_with_sla_credit: integer count of enterprise accounts with positive monthly_export SLA credit percent
